name: Tropical Stuffed Pears
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the sour cream, crushed pineapple, miniature marshmallows, flaked coconut, and chopped pecans.
2. Place pear halves on lettuce leaves if desired.
3. Spoon the pineapple mixture into the center of each pear.
Yield: 6-7 servings.
Submitted by Deborah Reno, Central City, KY - Serves this as a dessert after a quick lunch or dinner.
Quick Cooking Magazine, March/April '98 p. 11
